content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 3, 2002

Joice M. Beatty
1555 Voorhees Circle
St. Helena, CA 94574

Re: Mayor of St. Helena Campaign
Our File No. W-02-139

Dear Ms. Beatty:

This correspondence confirms our receipt of your advisement as to the disposition of the surplus campaign funds from your St. Helena mayoral race. As your notification relates to past conduct, we are unable to provide written advice (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Joan Giannetta
Legal Secretary

Enclosure
